prompt: An ultra-realistic studio beauty portrait of a young adult woman with deep brown to black hair pulled tightly back, photographed in an extreme close-up headshot crop against a clean light gray to white seamless background. The framing is very tight, showing the upper forehead and hairline across the top, the outer edges of both cheeks near the sides, and the lower jaw and chin near the bottom, with most of the face centered in frame. She has medium to deep warm brown skin with natural texture, visible pores, soft tonal variation, and subtle realism rather than heavy retouching. Her expression is neutral and calm, looking straight into camera. Use soft diffused studio lighting from the front with gentle shadow falloff, high detail skin rendering, crisp hairline detail, and a polished commercial skincare or beauty campaign aesthetic. Keep styling minimal: no visible jewelry, no distracting clothing details, no props, no text, no graphics. Photorealistic, high resolution, sharp focus, natural color grading, luxury editorial beauty photography.
